name: Apron
hint: A protective garment worn while cooking to prevent stains on clothing.

name: Blender
hint: A kitchen appliance used to blend, mix, or puree ingredients.

name: Coffee Maker
hint: An appliance that brews coffee by passing hot water through ground coffee beans.

name: Dish Rack
hint: A device used for drying washed dishes and utensils.

name: Egg Beater
hint: A hand-cranked tool for beating eggs or mixing ingredients.

name: Frying Pan
hint: A flat-bottomed pan with sloping sides used for frying and sautéing.

name: Garlic Press
hint: A kitchen tool designed to crush garlic cloves quickly and easily.

name: Grater
hint: A kitchen utensil with sharp perforations used for shredding food.

name: Knife Set
hint: A collection of knives of various types used for cutting and chopping.

name: Ladle
hint: A long-handled utensil with a deep bowl, used for serving soups and stews.

name: Measuring Cup
hint: A container with graduated markings for measuring liquids or dry ingredients.

name: Napkin Holder
hint: A decorative item used for holding napkins on the dining table.

name: Oven Mitt
hint: A padded glove or mitten used to protect hands when handling hot cookware.

name: Peeler
hint: A tool for removing the outer skin or peel of fruits and vegetables.

name: Quiche Dish
hint: A shallow, round baking dish often used for making quiches.

name: Rolling Pin
hint: A cylindrical tool used for rolling out dough for baking.

name: Salt Shaker
hint: A container with small holes for dispensing salt onto food.

name: Teapot
hint: A vessel with a spout and handle for steeping and serving tea.

name: Utensil Holder
hint: A container for storing kitchen utensils like spatulas and spoons.

name: Vegetable Peeler
hint: A specialized peeler for removing the skin from vegetables.

name: Wine Opener
hint: A tool for opening wine bottles by removing the cork.

name: Yogurt Maker
hint: An appliance used to ferment milk into yogurt.

name: Zester
hint: A tool for grating the outer peel of citrus fruits for flavor.

name: Baking Sheet
hint: A flat, rectangular pan used for baking cookies and pastries.

name: Can Opener
hint: A device for opening sealed metal cans.

name: Dish Soap Dispenser
hint: A container for dispensing liquid dish soap for washing dishes.

name: Egg Timer
hint: A timer used for accurately boiling eggs to desired doneness.

name: Food Processor
hint: An electric appliance used for chopping, blending, and pureeing food.

name: Glass Tumbler
hint: A drinking glass made of glass, often used for beverages.

name: Herb Grinder
hint: A tool for grinding dried herbs and spices for cooking.

name: Ice Cube Tray
hint: A tray with compartments for freezing water into ice cubes.

name: Juicer
hint: An appliance used to extract juice from fruits and vegetables.

name: Knife Sharpener
hint: A tool for sharpening the blades of knives for efficient cutting.

name: Lemon Squeezer
hint: A handheld device for extracting juice from lemons and other citrus fruits.

name: Microwave Oven
hint: An appliance for quickly heating and cooking food using microwaves.

name: Noodle Strainer
hint: A sieve-like utensil used for draining cooked noodles.

name: Oven Thermometer
hint: A device for measuring the temperature inside an oven.

name: Pizza Cutter
hint: A tool with a circular blade for slicing pizza into portions.

name: Rice Cooker
hint: An appliance for cooking rice automatically to perfection.

name: Salad Spinner
hint: A kitchen tool used to wash and remove excess water from salad greens.

name: Toaster
hint: An appliance for toasting slices of bread.

name: Vegetable Steamer
hint: A device for steaming vegetables to retain their nutrients.

name: Whisk
hint: A kitchen utensil with a handle and loops used for whipping and mixing.
